raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch Mahteſ bija Zibeâ
Wahrda no Versabas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Joas darrija/ kaſ tam
KUNGA M labbi patikke/ wiﬀâ
fawâ Laika/ kamehr tas Breeste-
ris Jojadus wiꞥſch mahzija.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tee Augstumi ween ne tap-
pe nopohſtiti/ jo tee Landis up-
pureja un kwehpinaja wehl us
teem Augstumeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Joas fazzija us teem
Breestereem: Wiﬀa ta Nauda/
kaſ Deewam par Gohdu tohp
dohta/ ka ta KUNGA Namnâ
tohp nesta/ ta Nauda / kaſ
(Prezzineeku Starpâ) tekâ/
ta Nauda / ko ikweens Zilweks
dohd/ pehz to/ ka tas spreests irr/
un wiﬀa ta Nauda/ ko ikkatrs
labbis Prahtis dohd/ kata KUN-
GA Namnâ tohp nesta/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "To buhs teem Breestereem
pee ſew neint/ ikkatram no fawa
Pasihſtama. Un teem buhs ta
Namna Plihfumus atkat zectus
darriht/ kur tee atrohd to eſſam
fagruifſchu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet tas notikkahs diuidef-
mitâ un treschâ Gaddâ Joafa/
ka tee Breesteri to eegruifſchu
Namnu ne bijatkat ſtiprinaſchi/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad aizinaja tas Rehninſch
Joas to Breesteri Jojadu / un
tohs zittus Breesterus/ un fazzi-
ja us teem: Rapehz juhs ne ſtip-
rinajeet atkat to Namnu/ kaſ ta
irr eegruiis? nu tad ne nemneet
wairs Naudu no jubsfeim Pasih-
ſtameem/ itt ka grihbedomi to par
to fagruifſchu Namnu iſdoht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fohlja tee Breeste-
wairs Naudu no teemi Laudii
ne nemt/ neds to eegruiifſch
Namnu atkat ſtiprinaht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet tas Breesteris Jo-
dus nehme weenn Schkirstu/u
ce-urbe Zaurunu ta paſcha Wa-
kâ/ un likke to fahnis to Alta-
pa labbo Kohku/ kad kaſ
KUNGA Namnâ nahze.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad tee nu redſeja dau-
Naudas Schkirstâ effam / ta-
nahze ta Rehnina Skrihwerie
un tas Augstajs Breesteris au-
ſcham/ un fatehje un ſkaitija
Naudu/ kaſ par ta KUNG
Namnu atrasts tappc.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee eeskaitija ta Na-
du teem Darba Peeluhkotajee-
Rohkâ/ kaſ eezelti bija pahr
KUNGA Namnu. Un tee i-
dewe to teem Renumeſcheem/ u-
Namna-Darritajeeem / kaſ
KUNGA Namnu pataſtija.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Prohti teem Muhrne-
keem un Akminzu-Zirtejeem / u-
ka tee Kohkus un zirtus Aku-
nus pirktu/ ka tas eegruiis Nam-
ta KUNGA atkat taptu ſtip-
nahts/ un par wiﬀu/ kaſ bija i-
sdohd par ta Namna Iſta-
ſchann.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tatſchu preekſch ta KUD-
GA Namnu ne tappa taiſ-
fudraba Raufi/ Spehles / Be-
ſeni/ Truimnetes/ nedg kab-
ſel
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
